skills.name: crm-roi-calculator
skills.description: Calculate the ROI of switching from spreadsheets or legacy CRM to a custom Go-Orca CRM. Inputs: team_size, hours_per_week_lost, average_hourly_rate, crm_investment. Returns annual savings, payback period, 3-year net return.

skills.name: cac-calculator
skills.description: Calculate Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC) given marketing spend and number of new customers acquired in a period. Returns CAC, LTV:CAC ratio, payback period.

skills.name: crm-cost-estimator
skills.description: Estimate the cost of building a custom CRM. Inputs: team_size, modules_needed, integration_count, timeline. Returns cost range and build timeline estimate.

skills.name: app-development-cost
skills.description: Provide real 2025 cost ranges for custom web and mobile app development. Returns cost range and timeline for MVP, web app, mobile app, or full product.
